comments.text: A constructive proof for a weaker bound has been given by R. L. Graham and J. H. Spencer in [GrSp71]. Edit: Thanks to Stijn for clarifying!

It is not solved there at all. It gives a constructive proof for a weaker bound. (one could consider it solved once the order of the solution is known, where now upper and lower bound are a factor $n$ off)
Correct. In fact, starting with "It seems" was an indicator of this underlying thought.
